nws_forecast.name: This Afternoon
nws_forecast.detailed: Mostly sunny, with a high near 51. Northwest wind around 13 mph.

nws_forecast.name: Tonight
nws_forecast.short_forecast: Cloudy then Slight Chance Light Rain
nws_forecast.detailed: A slight chance of rain after 5am. Cloudy, with a low around 35. Northeast wind 1 to 9 mph. Chance of precipitation is 20%.

nws_forecast.name: Sunday
nws_forecast.detailed: Rain. Cloudy, with a high near 45. Southeast wind 3 to 13 mph. Chance of precipitation is 90%. New rainfall amounts between a quarter and half of an inch possible.

nws_forecast.name: Sunday Night
nws_forecast.detailed: Rain. Cloudy, with a low around 34. North wind 5 to 12 mph, with gusts as high as 24 mph. Chance of precipitation is 80%. New rainfall amounts between a quarter and half of an inch possible.

nws_forecast.name: Monday
nws_forecast.short_forecast: Chance Light Snow then Chance Light Rain
nws_forecast.detailed: A chance of snow before 8am, then a chance of snow showers between 8am and 11am, then a chance of rain showers between 11am and noon, then a chance of rain. Cloudy, with a high near 40. North wind 10 to 14 mph, with gusts as high as 25 mph. Chance of precipitation is 40%. New snow accumulation of less than half an inch possible.

nws_forecast.name: Monday Night
nws_forecast.detailed: A slight chance of rain before 8pm, then a chance of snow showers between 8pm and 5am. Mostly cloudy, with a low around 30. North wind around 10 mph. Chance of precipitation is 20%. New snow accumulation of less than half an inch possible.

nws_forecast.name: Tuesday
nws_forecast.detailed: Mostly sunny, with a high near 43. West wind around 8 mph.

nws_forecast.name: Tuesday Night
nws_forecast.detailed: Mostly cloudy, with a low around 33. Southwest wind 8 to 12 mph.

nws_forecast.name: Wednesday
nws_forecast.detailed: A slight chance of rain after 7am. Partly sunny, with a high near 50. West wind around 13 mph.

nws_forecast.name: Wednesday Night

nws_forecast.name: Thursday
nws_forecast.short_forecast: Chance Light Rain then Chance Rain And Snow
nws_forecast.detailed: A chance of rain before 5pm, then a chance of rain and snow. Mostly cloudy, with a high near 47. Southeast wind around 10 mph. Chance of precipitation is 30%.

nws_forecast.name: Thursday Night
nws_forecast.detailed: Rain and snow likely. Mostly cloudy, with a low around 36. Southwest wind around 12 mph. Chance of precipitation is 60%.

nws_forecast.name: Friday
nws_forecast.detailed: Rain likely before 8am, then a chance of rain and snow. Partly sunny, with a high near 47. Northwest wind around 13 mph. Chance of precipitation is 60%.

nws_forecast.name: Friday Night
nws_forecast.short_forecast: Slight Chance Rain And Snow then Partly Cloudy
nws_forecast.detailed: A slight chance of rain and snow before 9pm. Partly cloudy, with a low around 25. Northwest wind around 13 mph. New snow accumulation of less than half an inch possible.
